## Feature idea

Describe the feature.

## Why is it useful?

Explain the listening insight, workflow, or release problem it improves.

## Suggested behavior

How should it look or work?

## Privacy impact

Does this need new data, Spotify API calls, export changes, or storage changes?

## Extra context

Mockups, screenshots, or examples.
